name: world-cup-2026-predictor
description: Build, launch, score, validate, and maintain an interactive 48-team World Cup 2026 predictor.

interface.shortDescription: Build and score a complete World Cup bracket.
interface.longDescription: Launch the interactive 48-team predictor, generate brackets, inspect live results, score predictions, and validate tournament data.
defaultPrompt: Launch the World Cup 2026 predictor and generate a complete bracket.
Check the latest completed World Cup matches.
Validate the predictor data and bundled app.
